title: Crypto AI Trading Bots?
author: Unfair_Ad_2129
selftext:
I'm not looking for anything terribly fancy but would love a platform well reviewed. I'm hoping to capture a solid 0.5% most days of the week which is totally doable in crypto given the usual volatility of certain coins. Ie:
LINK probably swings 1%+ a day, I could sit around and set limit buys and sells and get sweaty over stop losses all day long; but the reality is, with my current level of capital and short term gain taxes; it's not going to be enough to pay the bills for my family.


I lost my job (kinda- found out my contract will not be renewed end of February) and I have a child due in April so clocks ticking and I need to focus on securing a new job. While I'm networking and applying like a mad man, heck, while I'm sleeping-I'd love to be making small but frequent positive returns.


Does anyone have any suggestions on Al Trading Bot platforms for crypto?

and/or

coins to look into that have fairly high volatility and a relatively stable floor? (No meme coins thougu please)

Any and all input is appreciated da

comments.author: Mike_ox-l0ng
comments.body: Check out Gekko ai. A Virtuals project and they have bot that does it for you. Still new but lots of potential imo.

comments.author: tickeron_community
comments.body: Check out our new crypto ticker-centric AI Robots. You can choose a strategy for each coin based on the information you request.

comments.author: Apart_Yam9477
comments.body: Use chat gpt it works good. Consider a deel liquidity order book whale hunting strategy where you only trade with the whales. Ask in detail, and always ask to improve better
